name: @salary-hijacking/security
description: Shared security contracts for encryption, masking, permission and rate limiting in the Salary Hijacking platform.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run validate:dist
scripts.validate:package: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['name','version','private','type','main','module','types','exports','scripts','salaryHijacking']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg)); if(missing.length){console.error('[security] package.json missing keys:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} if(pkg.name!=='@salary-hijacking/security'){console.error('[security] invalid package name:', pkg.name); process.exit(1);} if(pkg.sideEffects!==false){console.error('[security] sideEffects must be false'); process.exit(1);} console.log('[security] package metadata validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:exports: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const required=['.','./encryption','./masking','./permission','./rate-limit','./rateLimit','./package.json']; const missing=required.filter((key)=>!(key in pkg.exports)); if(missing.length){console.error('[security] missing exports:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[security] export map validation passed.');"
scripts.validate:dist: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const required=['dist/index.js','dist/index.d.ts','dist/encryption.js','dist/encryption.d.ts','dist/masking.js','dist/masking.d.ts','dist/permission.js','dist/permission.d.ts','dist/rate-limit.js','dist/rate-limit.d.ts']; const missing=required.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p)); if(missing.length){console.error('[security] missing dist files:', missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[security] dist export map validation passed.');"
scripts.security:assert: node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then((m)=>{m.assertSecurityPackageCompleteness(); const report=m.getSecurityPackageCompletenessReport(); if(!report.ok){console.error('[security] package completeness failed:', JSON.stringify(report.missing,null,2)); process.exit(1);} if(report.moduleCount!==4||report.completeModuleCount!==4||report.reservedModuleCount!==0){console.error('[security] invalid module maturity report:', JSON.stringify({moduleCount:report.moduleCount,completeModuleCount:report.completeModuleCount,reservedModuleCount:report.reservedModuleCount})); process.exit(1);} console.log('[security] package completeness passed:', JSON.stringify({moduleCount:report.moduleCount,completeModuleCount:report.completeModuleCount,reservedModuleCount:report.reservedModuleCount,invariantCount:report.invariantCount}));}).catch((error)=>{console.error(error); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.security:self-test: node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then(async (m)=>{m.assertSecurityPackageCompleteness(); m.runEncryptionSelfTest(); m.runMaskingSelfTest(); m.runPermissionSelfTest(); await m.runRateLimitSelfTest(); console.log('[security] runtime self-tests passed.');}).catch((error)=>{console.error(error); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.security:scan: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const walk=(dir)=>fs.existsSync(dir)?fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((entry)=>{const p=path.join(dir,entry.name); return entry.isDirectory()?walk(p):p.endsWith('.ts')||p.endsWith('.json')?[p]:[];}):[]; const patterns=[/rawSecretLoggingAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/rawTokenLoggingAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/rawPiiLoggingAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/rawFinancialDataInAdsOrCommunityAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/browserDirectSecretAccessAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/browserDirectDatabaseAccessAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/browserDirectRateLimitAuthorityAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/clientFinalCalculationAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i,/rawIdentifierInKeyAllowed\s*[:=]\s*true/i]; const bad=[]; for(const file of [...walk('src'),'package.json'].filter((p)=>fs.existsSync(p))){const source=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'); for(const pattern of patterns){if(pattern.test(source)) bad.push(file+' :: '+pattern);}} if(bad.length){console.error('[security] source policy violation'); console.error(bad.join('\n')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[security] source policy scan passed.');"
scripts.privacy:check: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); const c=pkg.salaryHijacking; const bad=[]; for(const key of ['browserDirectSecretAccessAllowed','browserDirectDatabaseAccessAllowed','browserDirectRateLimitAuthorityAllowed','rawSecretLoggingAllowed','rawTokenLoggingAllowed','rawPiiLoggingAllowed','rawFinancialDataInAdsOrCommunityAllowed','rawFinancialDataInLogsAllowed','clientFinalCalculationAllowed','rawIdentifierInRateLimitKeyAllowed']){ if(c.securityContract[key]!==false) bad.push('securityContract.'+key); } for(const key of ['serverAuthorityRequired','piiEncryptionRequired','financialMetadataEncryptionRequired','refreshTokenHashingRequired','idempotencyKeyHashingRequired','webhookSignatureRequired','adminRbacRequired','adminMfaRequired','logMaskingRequired','authRateLimitRequired','writeRateLimitRequired','financialWriteIdempotencyRequired','notificationServiceAccountRequired','migrationServiceAccountRequired','keyRotationRequired','aadBindingRequired','auditLogRequiredForSensitiveOperations']){ if(c.securityContract[key]!==true) bad.push('securityContract.'+key); } if(c.calculationContract.currency!=='KRW') bad.push('calculationContract.currency'); if(c.calculationContract.moneyScale!==0) bad.push('calculationContract.moneyScale'); if(c.calculationContract.serverAuthorityRequired!==true) bad.push('calculationContract.serverAuthorityRequired'); if(c.calculationContract.clientFinalCalculationAllowed!==false) bad.push('calculationContract.clientFinalCalculationAllowed'); for(const key of ['adsFinancialRawJoinAllowed','communityFinancialRawJoinAllowed','notificationFinancialRawPayloadAllowed','growthFinancialRawPayloadAllowed','rawFinancialDataInLogsAllowed','rawFinancialDataInRateLimitKeysAllowed','rawPiiInRateLimitKeysAllowed','rawSecretInRateLimitKeysAllowed']){ if(c.dataSeparationContract[key]!==false) bad.push('dataSeparationContract.'+key); } if(bad.length){console.error('[security] privacy/security contract violation:', bad.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} console.log('[security] privacy and security contract check passed.');"
scripts.security:validate: corepack pnpm run validate:package && corepack pnpm run validate:exports && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm run security:assert && corepack pnpm run security:self-test && corepack pnpm run security:scan && corepack pnpm run privacy:check
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "console.log('[security] E2E is covered by API, mobile, admin and worker consumers.');"
scripts.test:qa: corepack pnpm run security:validate && corepack pnpm run test
scripts.docs:build: node -e "console.log('[security] package security contract docs are generated by repository docs pipeline from getSecurityPackageCompletenessReport().');"
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run security:validate && corepack pnpm run test && corepack pnpm run docs:lint && corepack pnpm run docs:build
